text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I purposely get up early and head to the grounds. I've
got a plan.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Much as I'd rather not, maybe I should skip the turf today. But
then again, I wouldn't want to cut my practice session this short...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You're that trainer! What are you doing here? Did you wake up
early again?
choice_data_list:
I wanted to ask you... Would you let me help
with your nail care?

I wanted to ask you... Would you let me help
with your nail care?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Really?! I-I mean, you would do that? We just met the other day!
choice_data_list: I want to see you compete on turf.
I want to see you compete on turf.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Me, compete on turf... Do you think I'll really be able to go
toe-to-toe with Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look her straight in the eyes, then nod. I'll handle all the checks and
maintenance.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Then I'll work as hard as I possibly can! Assuming that's all right with you, of course!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to start practicing with you! And I swear—I'll bring you
victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, after her classes, Bamboo Memory and I meet up to discuss our
plans.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So basically, I can train, but foot care comes first! ...Or something like
that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a good reason she's been practicing on dirt. It's more difficult
to gain speed on dirt, so it puts less strain on her feet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, it is easier to run faster on turf, but the tradeoff is
that it puts more strain on the feet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With how brittle her nails are, I can't switch Bamboo entirely to turf
yet. We're going to take the transition gradually and focus on
strengthening her nails first.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Gotcha! I mean, you know I'd love to get out there and run this
instant, but still!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Learning to take care of my nails is still learning! I promise, I'll follow
all your instructions to a tee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's a new day, and...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Whoa, Trainer! What's with the cutesy little bottles?
choice_data_list: I got you some cuticle oil and top coat!
I got you some cuticle oil and top coat!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...Cuticle? Oh, is that the stuff for nails? Those'll make them stronger,
right? Are you gonna teach me how they work?!
choice_data_list: Yep, we're doing a lesson on nail care today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Racers need to be in tip-top condition. I'm going to show her how to
moisturize and shield her nails so she can keep them in good shape.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right, sounds good! But just so you know, I've never done
pedicures or even painted my nails before.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So please, explain it all in extra detail! I wanna make sure I can do it
myself too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And on yet another day...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We're turning up the heat with this one! Red-hot routine—step
twenty! Lightspeed Launches and Falcon Swoop Sweeerves! ...And
done!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Trainer! The new-and-improved red-hot routine you made is
working great!
choice_data_list:
The original workout was good already, so I just
tailored it to racing.

The original workout was good already, so I just
tailored it to racing.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I can tell—the steps are new, but it's still got Dad's style! It
really gets you pumped to work out!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
The only critique I've got is that I kiiinda wish there were more laps
on the track.
choice_data_list:
I know, but self-discipline is worth practicing
too.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: True! Heheh, Dad says that a lot too.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: "You've gotta take red-hot breaks to stay in red-hot shape!" ...So I'm gonna rest harder than ANYONE!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Days later, I catch Bamboo Memory gazing wistfully at the
Umamusume training on the track.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Well, yeah. Deep down, I'm feeling pretty restless!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But you gave me your word. You promised that you'd get me ready
for turf, and I know you meant it.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So I'll trust your judgment. 'Cause a good athlete never loses faith in
those they trust! Dad taught me better than to give up hope now!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Wait, why're you thanking me?! I'm the one who should be grateful for all you do!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, speaking of which! Remember the cuticle oil you got me? I'm
almost out, so could you tell me where you got it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm at a bit of a loss for words. It's surprisingly hard to get students to
maintain routines outside lessons. Most would've forgotten the
tedious maintenance stuff by now...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
The drugstore? Gotcha! I'll zip over and restock, so leave the nail
care stuff to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It hasn't even been that long since we met, but Bamboo's so
dedicated to everything I teach her... It just goes to show what a hard
worker she is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And most of all, it drives home just how determined she is to make
her dreams come true.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We keep up our training, and several days later, around the time
Bamboo opens her second bottle of cuticle oil...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her steps are light and smooth, and I'm pleased to see that she's cut
down her time drastically from her early turf runs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've still gotta stay vigilant and make sure we're not putting too
much strain on Bamboo's feet, but for now...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: (All right, I've got this. And now...)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'll have a shot against Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the effort she's been pouring into training and maintenance is
paying off two-fold! If we keep this up, she's going to accomplish big
things!
